description: An RMM alert indicates that a server's C: drive has less than 10% free space.

nodes.task_description: Run a script via the RMM tool to identify the largest files and folders on the drive.

expected_outcome.value: The script reveals that old application log files are taking up most of the space.

nodes.task_description: Run another script to safely delete log files older than 90 days, freeing up space and resolving the alert.

expected_outcome.value: Disk space is reclaimed, and the alert clears.
